mapper.select: SELECT o.opening_id, o.project_id, p.project_name, o.lot_id, l.lot_code, l.lot_name, o.status, o.opening_time, o.opening_place, o.host_employee_id, o.recorder_employee_id, o.summary, o.abnormal_flag, o.abnormal_reason, o.version, o.create_time, o.update_time FROM t_bid_opening o INNER JOIN t_bid_project p ON p.project_id = o.project_id INNER JOIN t_bid_lot l ON l.lot_id = o.lot_id WHERE o.opening_id = #{openingId} AND o.deleted_flag = 0 AND p.deleted_flag = 0 AND l.deleted_flag = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT o.opening_id, o.project_id, p.project_name, o.lot_id, l.lot_code, l.lot_name, o.status, o.opening_time, o.opening_place, o.host_employee_id, o.recorder_employee_id, o.summary, o.abnormal_flag, o.abnormal_reason, o.version, o.create_time, o.update_time FROM t_bid_opening o INNER JOIN t_bid_project p ON p.project_id = o.project_id INNER JOIN t_bid_lot l ON l.lot_id = o.lot_id WHERE o.lot_id = #{lotId} AND o.deleted_flag = 0 AND p.deleted_flag = 0 AND l.deleted_flag = 0 ORDER BY o.opening_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT opening_item_id, opening_id, submission_id, submission_version_id, supplier_enterprise_id, supplier_name_snapshot, supplier_credit_code, quoted_price, document_check_result, open_comment, sort_no, create_time FROM t_bid_opening_item WHERE opening_id = #{openingId} AND deleted_flag = 0 ORDER BY sort_no ASC, opening_item_id ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_bid_opening_item WHERE opening_id = #{openingId} AND deleted_flag = 0
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_bid_opening
status = #{status}, opening_time = #{openingTime}, opening_place = #{openingPlace}, host_employee_id = #{hostEmployeeId}, recorder_employee_id = #{recorderEmployeeId}, summary = #{summary}, abnormal_flag = #{abnormalFlag}, abnormal_reason = #{abnormalReason}, update_user_id = #{updateUserId}, version = version + 1
WHERE opening_id = #{openingId} AND version = #{version} AND deleted_flag = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_bid_opening_item ( opening_id, submission_id, submission_version_id, supplier_enterprise_id, supplier_name_snapshot, supplier_credit_code, quoted_price, document_check_result, sort_no, deleted_flag ) SELECT #{openingId}, s.submission_id, sv.submission_version_id, s.supplier_enterprise_id, s.supplier_name_snapshot, s.supplier_credit_code, sv.price_amount, 'PASSED', 0, 0 FROM t_bid_submission s INNER JOIN t_bid_submission_version sv ON sv.submission_id = s.submission_id AND sv.version_no = s.latest_version_no AND sv.is_effective = 1 AND sv.deleted_flag = 0 WHERE s.lot_id = #{lotId} AND s.status = 'SUBMITTED' AND s.deleted_flag = 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_bid_opening_item oi WHERE oi.opening_id = #{openingId} AND oi.submission_id = s.submission_id AND oi.deleted_flag = 0 ) ORDER BY s.submission_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE t_bid_submission s INNER JOIN t_bid_opening_item oi ON oi.submission_id = s.submission_id AND oi.opening_id = #{openingId} AND oi.deleted_flag = 0 SET s.status = 'OPENED', s.update_user_id = #{updateUserId}, s.update_time = NOW(), s.version = s.version + 1 WHERE s.status = 'SUBMITTED' AND s.deleted_flag = 0
